Taurus Mining Ventures

Mentions Timeline (15 articles)
3308-06-29
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part Five)
Part five concludes with the Didio-Novas-Sosong invasions, the INRA base discovery in DG Canum Venaticorum revealing Caleb Wycherley's identity as the Witch, Project Seraph survivor D-2's testimony, and Azimuth Biotech's public resurrection.
3308-06-28
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part Four)
Part four traces the escalating rivalry between Aegis and Salvation, Admiral Tanner's failed assault on Hind Mine and court martial, the simultaneous invasions of Delphi, Maia and Merope, and the discovery of Alexandria debris revealing Azimuth's survival.
3308-06-28
Azimuth A Historical Perspective (Part Three)
Part three covers Salvation's emergence in April 3307, his recruitment of pilots through Taurus Mining Ventures, the Cornsar incident where his prototype superweapon repelled a Thargoid fleet, and his rise as a rival to Aegis.
3308-06-24
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part Two)
Part two traces Aegis from its 3303 creation through the Alexandria disaster, Admiral Tanner's rogue assault on Hind Mine, and its dissolution following the Baumann Report.
3308-06-20
Azimuth Resurgent
Salvation publicly reveals that Taurus Mining Ventures is a front for Azimuth Biotech, admitting his identity as Caleb Wycherley's successor and claiming credit for the mycoid virus and Guardian superweapon research.
3307-12-17
Salvation Recruits Naval Crews
Commodore Morag Halloran reveals that hundreds of naval officers from all three superpowers and Sirius have resigned to join Salvation's anti-xeno crusade.
3307-12-14
Thargoids Repulsed from Three Systems
Salvation's anti-xeno superweapons successfully repel Thargoid vessels from Delphi, Maia and Merope during Operation Tri-hammer, with pilots now asked to help repair damaged starports.
3307-11-18
Salvation’s Allies Triumph in T Tauri System
Taurus Mining Ventures defeats Admiral Aden Tanner's rogue Aegis Defense force in the T Tauri system and gains control of the Musashi megaship.
3307-11-11
Aegis Renegades Attack Salvation’s Allies
Admiral Aden Tanner's rogue Aegis Defense force initiates conflict with Taurus Mining Ventures in the T Tauri system to obtain evidence of Salvation's anti-xeno weapon from Hind Mine asteroid base.
3307-11-05
Aegis Leader Opposes Salvation
Admiral Aden Tanner relocates the Aegis Defense megaship Musashi to the T Tauri system to challenge Taurus Mining Ventures and demand access to Hind Mine asteroid base, believing it contains evidence of Salvation's provocations against the Thargoids.
3307-10-28
Thargoid Fleets Invade Nebula Systems
Large Thargoid fleets attack multiple systems in the Pleiades, Witch Head, California, and Coalsack Nebulas. Aegis is unable to assist due to the operational shutdown from the public inquiry.
3307-07-01
Salvation Eclipses Aegis to Obtain Guardian Artefacts
Taurus Mining Ventures' campaign for Salvation collects more Guardian artefacts than Aegis's rival campaign. Patience Middleton congratulates supporters and offers top contributors a specially engineered Guardian Shard Cannon. The Pilots Federation cautions that modules from Taurus Mining Ventures will be marked hot.
3307-06-24
Aegis and 'Salvation' Compete for Guardian Artefacts
Aegis and Taurus Mining Ventures launch rival Guardian artefact collection campaigns in PMD2009 48. Salvation claims exclusive rights to the Proteus battlefield site. The superpowers warn that modules from Taurus Mining Ventures will be marked 'hot'. Professor Tesreau states Aegis must replace artefacts lost with the Alexandria.
3307-06-18
Guardian-Thargoid Battlefield Discovered
Pilots discover the Proteus, an Anaconda from the Hesperus, at a historical battlefield on Trapezium Sector YU-X c1-2 1a. The site contains physical evidence of the ancient war between Guardians and Thargoids. Professor Alba Tesreau announces Aegis will conduct surveys, hoping to replace Guardian artefacts lost with the Alexandria.
3307-05-07
The Voice of 'Salvation'
The mysterious figure 'Salvation' sends a message to pilots who discovered the Hesperus, authorising Taurus Mining Ventures to pay for logs and promising further work. He claims his scientific breakthroughs will 'literally save all of humanity'.
